mission.title: hami: feat: add informer-based pod cache to reduce API server load
mission.description:
**What type of PR is this?**

/kind feature

**What this PR does / why we need it**:

This PR adds an informer-based pod cache mechanism to the vGPUmonitor component to significantly reduce Kubernetes API server load. The key improvements include:

1. Implemented a local pod cache using Kubernetes Informers that only watches pods on the current node
2. Added event handlers to maintain cache consistency on pod lifecycle events (add/update/delete)
3. Optimized container list refresh with time-based throttling (default 30s interval)
4. Added configurable resync interval via the `HAMI_RESYNC_INTERVAL` environment variable
5. Improved container cleanup logic using cached pod information

**Real-world problem scenario**: When the cluster has more than 50 nodes, the number of vGPUmonitor instances equals the number of nodes, creating excessive pod list query pressure on the kube-apiserver. In our testing, API server CPU usage significantly increased in large clusters. This optimization can re
